creator: ticso@cicely9.cicely.de
text:
The devel/perforce port tries to install the i386 binaries on alpha.
It's also spamming my shared distfiles directory with i386 binaries.

Fix: 

Either mark the port as i386 only or install the r99.1 FreeBSD-alpha Version.
And maybe put the distfiles into something like perforce/i386.
